corporate.note: Lucro Real: IRPJ 15% on taxable income + 10% surtax on portion exceeding BRL 240k/year + CSLL 9%

personal_income_tax.note: Monthly IRPF brackets 2025 (Lei 14.848/2024 table); annual threshold BRL 33.888 exempt

consumption_tax.note: ICMS (state VAT) 12% interstate; PIS 1.65%+COFINS 7.6% on revenue (Lucro Real); ISS 2-5% municipal services

social_contributions.note: INSS employer 20% on gross payroll; FGTS 8% (Fundo de Garantia do Tempo de Servico)

tax_regime_thresholds.note: Lucro Real mandatory above BRL 78M annual revenue or for financial institutions
